description_long: This is a cylindrical, open-top trash bin with a flared rim, finished in a glossy, vibrant red color. The surface shows some irregular, lighter patches and subtle speckling, suggesting wear or exposure to the elements. The bin is seamless, with no visible handles, wheels, or lid, and the interior is also red and smooth. The wide, outward-curving rim provides structural reinforcement and makes it easy to deposit waste. The overall form is simple and utilitarian, suitable for public spaces such as sidewalks, parks, or garages. There are no visible labels, signage, or recycling symbols on the exterior.
description: A glossy red, open-top cylindrical trash bin with a flared rim and subtle surface wear, unmarked and handleless.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flared rim and open top, with visible surface wear and no handles or labels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, continuous cylindrical body and the pronounced rim, with no additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open top and subtle surface speckling, with no distinguishing marks.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the glossy finish, open interior, and the absence of handles, wheels, or signage.
